COMING SOON
Rumi’s Kitchen
THE ESSENCE OF PERSIAN HOSPITALITY
The fire of God’s love set a flame in Rumi’s heart eight centuries ago and produced a poet and a lover of humanity like few before or since.  In Rumi’s’ poetry, love is the soul of the universe which heals all humans.  In his own words, “Love is the heart’s paradise, having fountains & gardens....Within it the righteous eat & drink, & the free rejoice and are happy.”  Rumi’s Kitchen is a place where hospitality, love, & friendship come together for the joy of the exquisite cuisine & traditions of Persia, the poetic land of Rumi.  Rumi’s Kitchen draws influence from the culinary mother of the Middle East, Persia, which spanned from the banks of the Nile river in the west, to the mountains of northern India in the East, and from the shores of the Caspian Sea in the north, to the deserts of Arabia in the South of the Persian Gulf.  We invite you to experience the love & hospitality on which Rumi’s Kitchen has been established.
EXPERIENCE THE HOSPITALITY
FOOD IS LOVE

COMING SOON
Chef Ali Mesghali
A LOVE FOR COOKING
Chef Ali Mesghali’s love of cooking began while growing up in Esfahan, Iran and Los Angeles, California. This interest grew to become a passion and a career after Ali moved to Atlanta, Georgia. In the kitchen, as well as in the dining room, Ali is known for his pursuit of perfection, his intensity and a love for what he does. This unending aspiration for perfection has been instrumental in establishing the standard for Persian cuisine in Atlanta. His unique and flavorful touch has been wowing patrons at Rumi’s Kitchen in the past 5 years and has created a place where people want to visit again and again.
EXPERIENCE OUR CUISINE
The Rumi’s Team
Our team works together like the “gears in a clock” in making sure all our patrons’ needs are met while dining at Rumi’s Kitchen. We assure that the essence of Persian hospitality and Rumi’s love are felt during your dining experience at Rumi’s Kitchen.
